title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 19 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 19 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 19 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/04/2024
DCE iron ore futures tight, The main contract I2409 closed at 871.an decrease of 0.34% throughout the day;Traders ship according to market conditions; Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand. The overall market trading atmosphere was quiet today. PBF at Shandong port dealt 880-885 yuan/mt; decreased 0-5 yuan/mt over yesterday.
